title: Kilt-ForgeConfigAPIPort-Fix
description: Fix something between Kilt and ForgeConfigAPIPort
body:
## Kilt ForgeConfigAPIPort Fix

## <font color="red">**This mod has been merged into Kilt repo, so it would not be updated.**</font>

This mod aims to fix an issue between [Kilt](https://modrinth.com/mod/kilt) and [Forge Config API Port](https://modrinth.com/mod/forge-config-api-port).

### What is the ISSUE?
When Kilt is installed alongside ForgeConfigAPIPort, the config loading is too late so that some mods can't read the correct config values of them in the early mod-loading stage. So this mod perhaps solve your problem if the modified config values can't be applied properly after launching game.
